No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about advanced curriculum design and research in higher education (4.3) and explicitly fosters intercultural competence and cultural diversity (4.7).
evidence: Studies in Intercultural Curriculum Design for Chinese as a Second/Foreign Language
培養學生具備跨文化華語課程設計與教學研究的應用、反思的能力
能認識國際外語課程大綱的最新發展趨勢與課程設計概念

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced professional skills for teaching Chinese, contributing to productive employment and decent work in the education sector (Target 8.5).
evidence: 具備華語文教學之進階專業知能
To acquire an advanced knowledge and professional skills of teaching Chinese as a foreign language

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on 'curriculum design and research' fosters innovation in educational methods, aligning with enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).
evidence: 華語文跨文化課程設計與研究

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explicitly addresses intercultural communication, anti-bias curriculum, and immigrant experiences, promoting social inclusion and reducing inequalities (Target 10.2, 10.3).
evidence: 融入越南文化之反偏見課程行動研究
Diverse Perspectives of the Immigrant Experience

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course's focus on 'Chinese society and culture' and 'exploring cities' indirectly contributes to appreciating and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 具備華人社會與文化的專門知識
Using the five senses to explore the cities

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course fosters intercultural communicative competence and explores anti-bias curricula, promoting inclusive societies and non-discriminatory policies (Target 16.b).
evidence: 融入越南文化之反偏見課程行動研究

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims for multi-national/multi-lingual cooperation and includes international guest lectures, supporting knowledge sharing and partnerships (Target 17.6).
evidence: 具備進行多國多語種之華語文教學、研究及合作計畫之能力
線上演講:台語作為第二外語教學 慕尼黑工業大學、慕尼黑大學講師
